Dior Mini Book Tote
A retro and stylish statement piece ♡ Exquisite embroidery craftsmanship perfectly presented, adding a highlight to your outfit with just a casual carry. This mini size is so adorable! It's also convenient for holding small odds and ends. Who uses it becomes stylish; it's a must-have for pretty girls who love high aesthetics.

Fits an iPad Air 4 or an iPad Pro 11

items.name_en: Genuine Grade Original Factory Leather Version [Leather mixed with Milky White Constellation and Shoulder Strap ❤ Medium Size]
items.name_cn:
Genuine Grade Original Factory Leather Version [Leather mixed with Milky White Constellation and Shoulder Strap ❤ Medium Size]
Dior book tote shopping bag
Inspired by Creative Director of Women's Wear Maria Grazia Chiuri, this Book Tote bag is a flagship product that embodies Dior aesthetics. It can hold various daily items, featuring a new interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with D-Stripes embroidery, offering a more fashionable look. The front is adorned with the 'Christian Dior' logo, fully reflecting Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Style No.: 1286
Size: 36×28 cm

items.name_cn:
Genuine Grade, High Version
[Top Tier Original Order Denim Blue D💙Medium Size] Dior book tote shopping bag
This Book Tote bag is inspired by Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri and is a flagship product embodying Dior aesthetics. It can hold various daily items, featuring a new interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with the D-Stripes pattern embroidery, offering a more fashionable look. The front is adorned with the "Christian Dior" logo, fully reflecting Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Style No.: 1286
Dimensions: 36 x 27.5 x 16.5 cm (L x H x W)
Spacious interior, fits 1 15-inch laptop, 1 clutch, 1 wallet, 1 mobile phone, sunglasses, and lipstick

It is truly excessively beautiful!! ✔️

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
❤️【Lady Dior My ABC】'Matte Black Calfskin'
/5-Compartment Calfskin/
This handbag embodies Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty.
Exquisitely crafted from lambskin with a signature herringbone stitching and quilted details, this classic design is timeless.
Adorned with tonal enamel, lined with suede, and equipped with a chain shoulder strap and a zip pocket inside.
Can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.
Size: 24 x 20 x 11 cm

Genuine quality
🌟Classic Lady D Three-Compartment Grey Lambskin
Model 0505
This Lady D bag combines elegance with a modern flair.
Crafted from exquisite lambskin, it features enamel lettering and a detachable shoulder strap.
Elegant and practical, it offers ample space for daily storage.\nLightweight and easy to carry.
A must-have for fashionistas.
Perfect details that rival the real thing, super 5🌟 rating
Size: 17*15*7cm
